title: CacheSage-UC NutShell Cache Verification Plan

coverage_summary.note: Measured by the executable Python harness with seed 11 and 48 transactions. Replace with RTL functional coverage after Picker/Toffee regression runs.

fault_injection_targets: replacement state does not advance after refill
dirty bit clears before victim writeback is accepted
refill beat index is shifted by one word
write mask is ignored on store hit
request metadata changes while downstream ready is low
